summary: Hyunwoo Kang confronts Moon Do-yeong, the former owner of Crescent Moon, and realizes he is the mysterious 'Alley Boss' who took his money. Despite the history of debt and conflict regarding the club's finances, both parties agree to set aside their past grievances. They decide to move forward as business partners to build a professional team for the club.
key_moments: Hyunwoo Kang identifies Moon Do-yeong as the Alley Boss.
They acknowledge the past debt and the origins of the club's operating funds.
The two agree to put aside personal feelings to work together on the team's future.
